title: COBBLEVERSE: Badges & Trophies
description: Adds Pokémon Gym Badges and League Trophies from the Kanto, Johto, Hoenn and Sinnoh regions, with more coming soon!
body:
![CobbleverseBadges - Pokémon Gym Badges and League Trophies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/PHT3Zj0r/images/27d1865be5c2a6c77da229f42935b891b5bb0a1d.png)

**Cobbleverse Badges** is a Minecraft mod that adds collectible **Pokémon Gym Badges** and **League Trophies** from the Kanto, Johto, Hoenn and Sinnoh regions (with **all regions planned** for future updates!).

## ✨ Features

- 🏅 **Gym Badges from Kanto, Johto, Hoenn and Sinnoh**
  - Unique items representing each Gym Leader
  - Fully textured and visually distinct
- 🏆 **League Trophies**
  - Special trophies awarded to Champions of each region
- 🔥 **Custom Item Properties**
  - Fireproof
  - Non-stackable
- 📦 **Modpack Integration**
  - Fully integrated with the [**COBBLEVERSE**](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cobbleverse) modpack
- 🔮 **Future Plans**
  - Additional regions (Unova, Kalos, Alola, Galar and Paldea) will be added in upcoming updates!

## 💬 A few words from us

While developing the **COBBLEVERSE** modpack, we realized we needed a few special items, like **badges and trophies**, to support our progression system. Since nothing quite fit what we had in mind, we decided to create them ourselves.

Because these items might also be useful to other players and creators, we chose to release this as a standalone mod, not just as an internal part of the modpack.

This is our **very first Minecraft mod**, and we’re still learning as we go, so thank you for your patience and support! We also want to apologize if the texture quality isn't top-notch; we're not artists, but we will be happy to improve it in the future. 

We plan to update this mod regularly as new Gyms and regions are added to **COBBLEVERSE**, until we’ve included **all existing Pokémon regions**.

Thanks for checking it out, we hope you enjoy it! ❤️💙

---
